mainEntity.name: Can I get workers comp if my neck pain came from staring at a computer all day?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, repetitive motion or ergonomic injuries are covered. You must prove through medical testimony that your job duties—like constant computer use or repetitive lifting—directly caused your neck condition.
